title: Rosaria J. Baldari
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Rosaria J. Baldari''' is an artist who provided illustrations for many of the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' supplements.

==Star Wars Works==
*''[[Battle for the Golden Sun]]''
*''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]''
*''[[Scavenger Hunt]]''
*''[[Riders of the Maelstrom (West End Games)]]''
*''[[Classic Campaigns]]''
*[[Starfall (adventure)|''Starfall'']]
